Apache SPark on Databricks:


Spark Execution/Cluster Modes:
    Standalone: usually for databricks
    Yarn: Most Important
    Mesos
    Kubernetes
    Local: normal dev

Spark Master UI:
spark://10.3.9.1:7443

Environment:
Properties: spark.sql.adaptive.enabled -> when this enabled, parameter shuffle.Partition is useless
.shuffle.partition
autoBoradcastJoinThreshold

Adaptive Query Execution:
    coalescing post-shuffle partition
    converting sort-merge join to broadcast join
    converting sort-merge join to shuffle hash join
    optimizing skew join
    splitting skewwed shuffle partitions
